name: Respec DriftDetector
instruction: Cross-check the requirements in .kiro/specs/*/requirements.md against tasks in tasks.md. For each requirement ID (FR-X.Y), verify at least one task references it in an **Implements:** line. For each task, verify it references at least one requirement. Write a JSON array of issues to .kiro/respec/insights.json with format: [{"id": "<random-uuid>", "agentName": "DriftDetector", "severity": "warning" or "error", "targetId": "FR-X.Y" or "T-X", "message": "description of the issue", "accepted": false}]. Severity should be "warning" for orphaned requirements and "error" for unlinked tasks. Only include actual issues found. If no issues, write an empty array [].
